description: When new litigation is anticipated, an in-house counsel must issue a litigation hold notice to all relevant employees to preserve documents.

nodes.task_description: Identify the employees and departments likely to have relevant documents for the new matter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of custodians (e.g., key engineers, sales team).

nodes.task_description: Draft a litigation hold notice that clearly explains the subject of the litigation and the employees' obligation to preserve all related documents.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes a clear and comprehensive legal hold memo.

nodes.task_description: Distribute the notice to all identified custodians and track their acknowledgements.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the notice and monitors who has acknowledged receipt.
